name: Saute of Wild Mushrooms with Parsley
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Mixed fresh wild mushrooms (such as procini, crimini, chanterelles, morels, and oyster)
recipeInstructions:
1. Thickenly slice procini if using.
2. Cut any large mushrooms into quarters; smaller ones may be left whole.
3. Melt butter in a heavy large skillet over medium-high heat.
4. Add mushrooms, minced garlic, and 1 tablespoon chopped parsley to the skillet.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Sauté until the liquid given off by the mushrooms has evaporated, about 10 minutes.
7. Divide the sautéed mushrooms among plates.
8. Sprinkle with the remaining 1 tablespoon chopped parsley and serve.
